{{Quote|Where do you think you are going with that blaster, young lady? Come back here and introduce yourself to handsome Baron Bertrum.|Lady Agatha|<ref name="LOTE">''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''</ref>}}
Lady '''Agatha''' was a [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] noble during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She was a domineering social [[Matriarch/Legends|matriarch]] of an unknown [[Tapani Noble Houses|noble house]] and she was said to run her manor like a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]]. She was a great believer in finding something for the young noble of the house to do apart from party and enjoy themselves and was constantly trying to match up the young nobles in her charge with appropriate suitors.<ref name="LOTE" />
